---
title: Background
description: Set a full-page background image.
---

import TryItPdf from "../../../components/TryItPdf.tsx";
import background from "../../../examples/templates/background.json?raw";

Set `config.page.background` to a `{ "src": "<data-uri-or-url>", "type": "image" }` to draw a
full-page background behind every page. The example below uses an embedded data-URI image (so the
seed is large), then places content on top across two pages.

<TryItPdf mode="template" initialCode={background} client:only="react" />
